title: Gravity Sandbox
description: N-body orbital physics sim — place planets, set velocities, watch solar systems form and collide.
concept: A real-time n-body gravitational simulation where you build your own solar systems. Drag to hurl bodies with velocity, watch orbits stabilize or chaotically collapse, and see bodies merge on collision. Five presets include a full solar system, binary stars, the famous figure-8 three-body orbit, Trojan-point formation, and a chaotic cluster.
features: Click-drag velocity placement — drag direction/length sets initial velocity, drag up to increase mass
Select / delete tools for managing individual bodies
5 presets: Solar System, Binary Stars, Figure-8, Trojan Points, Chaos Cluster
Adjustable G constant, time speed, and trail length
Inelastic merging on collision — bodies absorb each other conserving momentum

interaction.mouse: Click to place body; drag to add velocity (up = heavier); scroll to zoom; shift-drag to pan
interaction.touch: Tap to place; pinch to zoom
